summary: Verified all three reported bug fixes on KREVION home page + backend regression. Hero overlap fix confirmed, pharmaceutical technical terminology present in all 6 required categories, world map SVG renders 36 laser corridor paths from India (all 18 destinations with static+animated pairs) with India label. Live badge, all 6 region cards, and Products navigation all working. Backend contact/quotation/newsletter endpoints functional.
passed: Home page loads with 0 console errors
Hero 'Internationally Compliant Facilities' caption visible (no overlap)
Hero headline 'Delivering Trusted Healthcare Solutions Beyond Borders' visible
product-categories-grid renders with technical pharmaceutical subtitles

All 6 required technical terms present: IMMEDIATE & MODIFIED-RELEASE SOLID ORAL DOSAGE FORMS, STERILE PARENTERAL FORMULATIONS, POWDER FOR ORAL SUSPENSION (POS), OPHTHALMIC STERILE PREPARATIONS, HYDROGELS & ORGANOGELS, METERED-DOSE NASAL PREPARATIONS
world-map-svg renders with 36 laser paths (stroke #18B7B0 or url(#laser)) - well above 15 threshold
56 <animate> elements present (laser pulses + India origin ping)
India origin text label present inside SVG
'Live Export Corridors' badge visible near map
All 6 region cards present: market-middle-east, market-africa, market-asia, market-cis, market-latin-america, market-south-east-asia
